categories.doc: Input failed validation (bad shape, missing required field, cross-field constraint). Maps to the 400 / VALIDATION_FAILED transport surface; also classifies the auth-boundary codes whose user-facing shape stays uniform regardless of which check failed.
The requested resource does not exist. Maps to the 404 / NOT_FOUND transport surface.
The operation conflicts with current state (resource already exists, idempotent request in flight). Maps to the 409 / CONFLICT transport surface.
The caller is authenticated but the action is denied by policy (insufficient scope, forbidden, session revoked). Consumers treat this class as non-retryable.
The request was throttled. Maps to the 429 / RATE_LIMITED transport surface; consumers may back off and retry.
The request payload exceeds the maximum allowed size. Maps to the 413 / PAYLOAD_TOO_LARGE transport surface.
A downstream dependency is unreachable (JWKS, session store, a service the operation depends on). Maps to the 503 transport surface; consumers may retry any code in this class generically.
An unexpected internal failure (unhandled exception, serialization failure). Maps to the 500 transport surface; not safe to retry without operator insight.

A multi-target operation succeeded against some targets but not all — the read-partial SOME_FOUND (206) and write-partial PARTIAL_SUCCESS (207) codes. Not a failure; data is carried alongside the result.
